category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Kuwait) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Kuwait Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入科威特：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入科威特：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Kuwait requirements: PAI KUCAS conformity (Technical Evaluation Report and per-shipment certificate), GSO/IEC 62133 cell safety, CITRA radio approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与科威特要求对照：PAI的KUCAS合格评定（技术评估报告及逐批证书）、GSO/IEC 62133电芯安全、无线功能的CITRA无线电核准、UN 38.3运输，以及当地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與科威特要求對照：PAI的KUCAS合格評定（技術評估報告及逐批證書）、GSO/IEC 62133電芯安全、無線功能的CITRA無線電核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及當地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters targeting Kuwait must obtain GSO/IEC 62133 safety testing, a PAI KUCAS conformity certificate (Technical Evaluation Report plus a per-shipment certificate where in scope), CITRA radio approval for any wireless function, a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and must ship through a Kuwait-registered in-country importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 以科威特为目标市场的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，须取得GSO/IEC 62133安全检测、PAI的KUCAS合格评定证书（技术评估报告及适用范围内的逐批证书）、任何无线功能的CITRA无线电核准、有效的UN 38.3运输报告，并须通过在科威特注册的当地进口商发货——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 以科威特為目標市場的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，須取得GSO/IEC 62133安全檢測、PAI的KUCAS合格評定證書（技術評估報告及適用範圍內的逐批證書）、任何無線功能的CITRA無線電核准、有效的UN 38.3運輸報告，並須透過在科威特註冊的當地進口商發貨——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true.
